history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a dark-themed game interface screen titled “LEVEL UP!” with a profile panel displaying progress numbers for a user named “Kayzzz.”

The main subject is a horizontally centered user interface card with the heading “LEVEL UP!” at the top, including a circular avatar on the left and several labeled progress boxes and statistics.

The setting is entirely graphic/UI-based, with a dark purple and black background and a glowing gold title at the top. The lighting appears as stylized UI highlights rather than a real-world scene, and the layout is centered with rounded rectangles and a soft purple gradient.

The interface card is a rounded rectangle with a subtle border and a large empty dark area on the right. On the left inside the card is a circular avatar framed by a purple ring; inside the circle is a stylized image with the text “KAYZ MARKET” visible in white/yellow/orange tones, plus smaller text that is unclear. In the center-left, the name “Kayzzz” appears in large white text, with a small rounded badge to the right showing “#1”. Below that are two main rounded boxes: one dark box labeled “LEVEL” with a large “11” in white, and one teal-green box labeled “EXPERIENCE” with “9 / 600” in white. Beneath these is a long horizontal progress bar with a purple fill near the left and a label “1%” in white on the right side. At the bottom of the card are three smaller dark rounded boxes labeled “MESSAGES,” “XP NEEDED,” and “NEXT LVL,” with values “1,331,” “591,” and “12” respectively. Near the bottom center outside the smaller boxes is faint text that reads “Congratulations on leveling up!” (partially visible due to low contrast).

Visible Text:

Congratulations on leveling up!
KAYZ MARKET
(No other readable text detected inside the avatar.)

Practical Summary:
This image is a level-up progress UI showing “Kayzzz” at level 11 with experience progress toward 600. It also displays counts for messages, XP needed, and the next level.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
